title: Transfer rumors, news: Nine Premier League clubs eye Leicester wonderkid
summary: Around half of Premier League clubs are interested in signing Leicester City winger Jeremy Monga, according to Transfer Talk's latest report. The strong demand for the young talent demonstrates his significance in the current transfer market.
content: Around half the teams in the Premier League want to sign Leicester City winger Jeremy Monga. Transfer Talk has the latest.

zh.title: 转会传言新闻：九家英超俱乐部关注莱斯特城神童

title: Ghanaian footballer killed after armed attackers open fire at team bus
summary: A Ghanaian footballer was killed when masked gunmen opened fire on a team bus returning from a match. The incident underscores the serious security risks faced by sports teams in certain regions.
content: The team was returning from a match when they were attacked by "masked men wielding guns", officials say.

title: Ranking the biggest Premier League title slip-ups
summary: BBC Football examines the top 10 Premier League teams who have squandered title leads, with Arsenal looking to overcome their history of title bottling. The analysis provides crucial context as teams battle for the championship.
content: With Arsenal desperate to banish their title-bottling demons, we look at the top 10 teams who have let Premier League leads slip.

title: Man City v Arsenal - winner takes all?

content: Match of the Day pundits Ben Foster and Pat Nevin discuss how the Premier League showdown between Man City and Arsenal could pan out - and what it will mean for the title race.

title: How crucial is 99-cap Walsh to the Lionesses?
summary: England midfielder Keira Walsh is set to earn her 100th cap in an upcoming match against world champions Spain at Wembley. The milestone marks her continued importance to the Lionesses' squad.
content: England midfielder Keira Walsh is set to make her 100th appearance against world champions Spain at Wembley.

zh.title: 99次出场纪录的沃尔什对英格兰队有多重要？

title: Sunderland condemn racist abuse of Brobbey
summary: Sunderland has condemned racist abuse directed at forward Brian Brobbey on social media, highlighting the ongoing and unacceptable frequency of such behavior in football. The statement underscores the persistent problem of online racism in sports.
content: Sunderland say racist abuse of forward Brian Brobbey on social media highlights the "ongoing and unacceptable frequency of this behaviour".

zh.title: 桑德兰谴责对布罗贝的种族歧视辱骂
zh.summary: 桑德兰俱乐部谴责了社交媒体上针对前锋布莱恩·布罗贝的种族歧视辱骂，强调了足球运动中此类行为持续且令人无法接受的频繁发生。该声明凸显了体育领域在线种族歧视的长期存在问题。

title: Mourinho's Benfica future down to 'club's wishes'
summary: Jose Mourinho has stated he will not make demands regarding his Benfica future, leaving any decision entirely to the club for next season. The manager's stance suggests uncertainty about his long-term position at the Portuguese club.
content: Jose Mourinho will not make any demands to remain at Benfica next season, insisting his future "depends on the club's wishes".

zh.title: 穆里尼奥的本菲卡未来取决于"俱乐部的意愿"

title: Ancelotti: Neymar can still make Brazil WC squad
summary: Brazil coach Carlo Ancelotti believes Neymar has sufficient time to regain full fitness and secure a spot in Brazil's FIFA World Cup squad. The assessment indicates the star player remains in contention despite previous availability concerns.
content: Brazil coach Carlo Ancelotti believes Neymar still has time to get back to being 100% and play at the FIFA World Cup.
